mapper.sql: SELECT p.progress_id, p.selection_id, p.phase, p.content, p.plan_date, p.actual_date, p.percent_done, p.submit_time, s.student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no, s.topic_id, t.topic_name, s.custom_topic_name, s.is_custom_topic, s.teacher_id, tea.real_name AS teacher_name, tea.teacher_no, s.campus_name, s.academic_year, s.status AS selection_status, s.create_time FROM project_progress p LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON p.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user stu ON s.student_id = stu.user_id AND stu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_topic t ON s.topic_id = t.topic_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.user_id AND tea.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE project_progress SET phase = #{phase}, content = #{content}, plan_date = #{planDate}, actual_date = #{actualDate}, percent_done = #{percentDone} WHERE progress_id = #{progressId}
UPDATE project_progress SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE progress_id = #{progressId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_progress WHERE progress_id = #{progressId} AND is_deleted = 0
